description: Synthesis profiles — merge multi-source lab datasets on explicit join keys (backend-only).

profiles.title: JKSE PIT × IDN microstructure × estimate revisions
profiles.description: Regional Indonesia proof: JKSE PIT + IDN FRY microstructure + Refinitiv revisions. One regional depth lane, not the cluster center.
assumptions: JKSE PIT month-end membership defines investable IDX universe.
Monthly IDN FRY aggregates proxy local informed-flow regime.
Month-end estimate revisions proxy sell-side positioning for covered ID names.
research_questions: Do bandar/chase regimes in IDN microstructure predict subsequent estimate revisions for JKSE large caps?
Which PIT JKSE constituents have rich IDN features but no sell-side coverage?
How stable is revision momentum across Indonesia index rebalance windows?

profiles.title: Skynet + Etherscan stablecoin synthesis
profiles.description: Join CertiK Skynet stablecoin leaderboard with Etherscan stablecoin token scrapes on Ethereum contract address. Surfaces linked entities, Skynet-only gaps (procure Etherscan scrape), and Etherscan-only tokens.
research_questions: Which coins score high on Skynet but show low on-chain adoption (holders / mcap)?
Where does security score diverge from exchange liquidity or open-source posture?
Which Skynet leaderboard coins still lack an Etherscan token page scrape?

profiles.title: Stablecoin trust ↔ engagement (full synthesis)
profiles.description: Cluster Skynet, Etherscan, community growth proxies, code security, DeFiLlama adoption/stress, GDELT entity+sector news, Wikipedia, GitHub activity, and curated incidents into entity×week/month panels.
research_questions: Which stablecoins combine rising community attention with deteriorating peg stress?
Does code security score (cross-section) align with GDELT security-exploit mention spikes?
Which entities have 5+ source layers for a credible trust vs engagement panel study?
Where are community growth proxies present but GDELT entity coverage is thin?

profiles.title: SEC EDGAR company ticker universe
profiles.description: Hydrate-first snapshot of SEC company_tickers.json (CIK, ticker, title) for entity spine research.
research_questions: How many distinct CIK / ticker pairs are in the current SEC universe?
Which title strings look like funds vs operating companies for entity filtering?
What fraction of tickers collide across CIKs (share-class / dual listing noise)?

profiles.title: TWSE daily quotes snapshot
profiles.description: Held TWSE STOCK_DAY_ALL OpenAPI harvest — cross-section of Taiwan listed names for microstructure / liquidity desk work.
research_questions: Which names dominate trade value on the latest TWSE daily cross-section?
How wide are open-to-close ranges for high-volume vs low-volume names?
What share of the board trades below a liquidity floor useful for research universes?
